title: Armadillo (Mob Vote 2023)
description: This texture pack changes goats to the armadillo from the Minecraft Mob Vote 2023.
body:
![ARMADILLO](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/19dnU2rI/images/4190b0738b08a92377c1effc3cc89f222a9c8ae9.png)

Vote for the armadillo !

This texture pack changes goats to the armadillo from the Minecraft Mob Vote 2023.

Optifine/EMF mod required.
